subject: Human Resources
title: The Future of HR
description: A fast breakdown of The Future of HR for builders.

hook.text: AI screens resumes. Chatbots answer benefits questions. Analytics predict who will quit. Where does HR go next?

buildup.text: HR is shifting toward data-driven decisions, employee experience design, and continuous learning cultures.

discovery.text: The future HR professional is part technologist, part psychologist, and part business strategist.

twist.text: Despite automation fears, the human element of HR—empathy, judgment, trust—can never be fully automated.

climax.text: Technology will handle transactions. Humans will handle transformations.

punchline.text: HR's future is more human, not less.

quiz.question: What aspect of HR cannot be automated?
